source_text: External Structure F.10.2.1 The Floor or Bottom must be made from one of the three: a. Steel 1.25 mm minimum thickness b. Aluminum 3.2 mm minimum thickness c. Equivalent Alternate / Composite materials ( F.4.1, F.4.3) F.10.2.2 Vertical Walls, Covers and Lids must be made from one of the three: a. Steel 0.9 mm minimum thickness b. Aluminum 2.3 mm minimum thickness c. Equivalent Alternate / Composite materials ( F.4.1, F.4.3) F.10.2.3 The accepted methods of joining walls to walls and walls to floor are: a. Welding - Welds may be continuous or interrupted. - If interrupted, the weld/space ratio must be 1:1 or higher - All weld lengths must be more than 25 mm b. Fasteners Combined strength of the fasteners must be Equivalent to the strength of the welded joint ( F.10.2.3.a above)
